reference: Hi, I should be eight weeks pregnant based on my last period dates. Two weeks ago, I went for a scan and there was only a sac. Today, I went for another one and there is now a yolk sac, but I couldn't see a baby. I know my dates could be off, but shouldn't we be seeing a baby by now? How many days after the yolk sac does the baby appear?
text: Hi, I should be eight weeks pregnant based on my last period dates. Two weeks ago, I went for a scan and there was only a sac. Today, I went for another one and there is now a yolk sac, but I couldn't see a baby. I know my dates could be off, but shouldn't we be seeing a baby by now? How many days after the yolk sac does the baby appear?
